name: Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice in 3/4 cup water over medium heat until tender, about 45 minutes.
2. Add the skim milk and sugar. Cook slowly over low heat until thickened, about 30 minutes.
3. Stir in the vanilla and raisins. Spoon into six serving dishes.
Food Exchanges per Serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1/2 MILK EXCHANGE; CAL: 189; PRO: 4g; CAR: 28g; FAT: 2g; SOD: 283mg.
